title: Configure Supabase Auth project settings
description: Set the required Supabase Auth configuration flags via the dashboard to enforce email verification, secure sessions, and appropriate token lifetimes.
acceptance_criteria: Email Confirmations is set to ON
Secure Email Change is set to ON
JWT expiry is set to 3600 seconds (1 hour)
Refresh Token Rotation is set to ON
Site URL is configured to the correct frontend origin

steps.details: Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Providers → Email. Enable 'Confirm email'. Enable 'Secure email change'.
Authentication → Configuration → Sessions. Set JWT Expiry to 3600. Enable 'Refresh token rotation'.

steps.description: Set Site URL and redirect allowlist
steps.details: Authentication → URL Configuration. Set Site URL to your frontend origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000 for dev). Add to Redirect URLs: http://localhost:3000/auth/callback

technical_notes: These settings affect the auth.users table and JWT tokens issued by Supabase. They cannot be set via SQL — must be done through the dashboard or Management API.
